title: C4 Envelopes — Product Specification & Pricing
content:
Arco Papers C4 Envelopes (229mm × 324mm). Suitable for A4 documents unfolded. Available in white and brown kraft. GSM options: 80gsm, 90gsm. Custom logo printing available.

Pricing tiers (per unit, PKR):
- Retail (1–99): PKR 18/unit
- Small bulk (100–499): PKR 14/unit
- Medium bulk (500–1999): PKR 11/unit
- Large bulk (2000+): PKR 8.50/unit

Minimum order: 50 units. Lead time: 2–3 working days for stock items; 5–7 days for custom print. Delivery available across Pakistan.

title: C5 Envelopes — Product Specification & Pricing
content:
Arco Papers C5 Envelopes (162mm × 229mm). Fits A5 or A4 folded in half. White and brown kraft variants. GSM: 80gsm standard. Peel-and-seal and gummed options.

Pricing tiers (per unit, PKR):
- Retail (1–99): PKR 12/unit
- Small bulk (100–499): PKR 9.50/unit
- Medium bulk (500–1999): PKR 7.50/unit
- Large bulk (2000+): PKR 5.75/unit

Minimum order: 50 units. Custom printing (logo, return address) available for orders of 500+. Popular with clinics and diagnostic centres for report delivery.

title: DL Envelopes — Product Specification & Pricing
content:
Arco Papers DL Envelopes (110mm × 220mm). Standard business letter envelope for A4 folded in thirds. Available in white, cream and brown. Window and non-window variants.

Pricing tiers (per unit, PKR):
- Retail (1–99): PKR 8/unit
- Small bulk (100–499): PKR 6.25/unit
- Medium bulk (500–1999): PKR 5/unit
- Large bulk (2000+): PKR 3.75/unit

Minimum order: 100 units. Custom pre-printed letterhead envelopes available. Widely used by corporate clients, government departments, NGOs.

title: A4 Envelopes — Product Specification & Pricing
content:
Arco Papers A4 Envelopes (305mm × 220mm). Designed to hold A4 sheets flat without folding. Brown kraft construction. Ideal for document mailers and tender submissions.

Pricing tiers (per unit, PKR):
- Retail (1–99): PKR 15/unit
- Small bulk (100–499): PKR 12/unit
- Medium bulk (500–1999): PKR 9.50/unit
- Large bulk (2000+): PKR 7.25/unit

Minimum order: 50 units. String-and-button (Tying Envelope) and self-seal variants available. Frequently ordered by law firms, architects, and government offices.

title: Courier / Polymailer Envelopes — Product Specification & Pricing
content:
Arco Papers Courier Envelopes (tamper-evident polymailers). Sizes: A5 (25×35cm), A4 (32×42cm), A3 (40×55cm). Water-resistant LDPE material. Permanent adhesive seal strip.

Pricing tiers (per unit, PKR):
- Retail (1–49): PKR 35/unit
- Small bulk (50–199): PKR 28/unit
- Medium bulk (200–999): PKR 22/unit
- Large bulk (1000+): PKR 17/unit

Minimum order: 25 units. Custom printing (logo, brand colour) available for 500+ units. Used by e-commerce sellers, couriers, and document dispatch.

title: Window Envelopes — Product Specification & Pricing
content:
Arco Papers Window Envelopes. DL size (110×220mm) with transparent address window (45×90mm). Eliminates need for address labels. White 80gsm paper, glassine window.

Pricing tiers (per unit, PKR):
- Retail (1–99): PKR 11/unit
- Small bulk (100–499): PKR 8.50/unit
- Medium bulk (500–1999): PKR 6.75/unit
- Large bulk (2000+): PKR 5.25/unit

Minimum order: 100 units. Suitable for utility bills, bank statements, invoices. Used by IDC (Islamabad Diagnostic Center) and similar institutions.

title: A4 Paper 70gsm — Product Specification & Pricing
content:
Arco Papers A4 Copier Paper 70gsm. ISO 216 A4 (210×297mm). Brightness: 92% ISO. Smooth surface suitable for laser and inkjet printers, photocopiers. Acid-free, archival quality.

Pricing tiers (per ream of 500 sheets, PKR):
- Retail (1–4 reams): PKR 1,100/ream
- Box (5–9 reams): PKR 980/ream
- Carton (10–49 reams): PKR 870/ream
- Bulk (50+ reams): PKR 780/ream

Available in boxes of 5 reams and cartons of 10 reams. Minimum order: 1 ream. Delivery for 10+ reams across Islamabad, Rawalpindi, Lahore.

title: A4 Paper 80gsm — Product Specification & Pricing
content:
Arco Papers A4 Premium Copier Paper 80gsm. ISO 216 A4 (210×297mm). Brightness: 96% ISO. Heavier stock — less show-through, superior print quality. Suitable for professional documents, reports, and presentations.

Pricing tiers (per ream of 500 sheets, PKR):
- Retail (1–4 reams): PKR 1,350/ream
- Box (5–9 reams): PKR 1,200/ream
- Carton (10–49 reams): PKR 1,080/ream
- Bulk (50+ reams): PKR 960/ream

Boxes of 5 reams; cartons of 10 reams. Minimum order: 1 ream. Preferred by corporate offices, universities, and diagnostic centres for formal documents.

title: A3 Paper 80gsm — Product Specification & Pricing
content:
Arco Papers A3 Paper 80gsm. ISO 216 A3 (297×420mm). Suitable for drawings, architectural plans, posters, spreadsheets. Brightness: 94% ISO. Compatible with A3 laser and inkjet printers.

Pricing tiers (per ream of 250 sheets, PKR):
- Retail (1–4 reams): PKR 1,600/ream
- Box (5–9 reams): PKR 1,400/ream
- Bulk (10+ reams): PKR 1,200/ream

Minimum order: 1 ream (250 sheets). Popular with engineering firms, architecture offices, and large-format print shops.

title: Letter Pads / Noteheads — Product Specification & Pricing
content:
Arco Papers Letter Pads (A4 and A5). 50 sheets per pad, perforated for easy tear-out. Plain white or ruled. Custom letterhead printing available (company logo, address).

Pricing tiers (per pad, PKR):
- Plain, retail (1–9 pads): PKR 120/pad
- Plain, bulk (10–49 pads): PKR 95/pad
- Plain, large bulk (50+ pads): PKR 75/pad
- Custom printed: add PKR 20/pad for logo printing (min 50 pads)

Minimum order: 5 pads. Turnaround for custom printing: 3–5 working days. Used by medical clinics for prescription pads, corporates for memo pads.

title: File Covers / Flat Files — Product Specification & Pricing
content:
Arco Papers Flat Files (L-shaped and U-shaped covers). A4 size. 200gsm card. Available in assorted colours. Clear front panel option for title visibility.

Pricing tiers (per piece, PKR):
- Retail (1–49): PKR 45/piece
- Small bulk (50–199): PKR 35/piece
- Medium bulk (200–499): PKR 28/piece
- Large bulk (500+): PKR 22/piece

Minimum order: 10 pieces. Custom colour and logo printing for 200+ units. Commonly supplied to government departments, hospitals, NGOs for record-keeping.

title: Box Files / Lever Arch Files — Product Specification & Pricing
content:
Arco Papers Box Files (75mm spine). A4 size. Rigid cardboard with PVC covering. Metal lever arch mechanism (2-ring D-ring, 75mm). Capacity: ~500 sheets.

Pricing tiers (per piece, PKR):
- Retail (1–9): PKR 320/piece
- Small bulk (10–49): PKR 265/piece
- Medium bulk (50–199): PKR 220/piece
- Large bulk (200+): PKR 175/piece

Minimum order: 5 pieces. Custom spine labels and logo printing available for 50+ units. Available in black, blue, red, green. Preferred by accounting firms and archiving departments.

title: Spiral Notebooks — Product Specification & Pricing
content:
Arco Papers Spiral Notebooks. A5 and A4 sizes. 100 ruled pages (50 leaves). 70gsm paper. Twin-wire spiral binding. Hard and soft cover options.

Pricing tiers (per piece, PKR):
- A5 soft cover: PKR 180 retail / PKR 140 bulk (50+) / PKR 110 large bulk (200+)
- A4 soft cover: PKR 240 retail / PKR 190 bulk (50+) / PKR 155 large bulk (200+)
- A4 hard cover: PKR 320 retail / PKR 260 bulk (50+) / PKR 210 large bulk (200+)

Minimum order: 10 pieces. Custom cover printing for corporate branding, events, conferences available for 50+ units.

title: Registers (A4 Ruled) — Product Specification & Pricing
content:
Arco Papers Registers. A4 size (210×297mm). Sewn binding (durable, long-lasting). 100, 200, and 400 page variants. 70gsm ruled pages. Hard cover with title panel.

Pricing tiers (per piece, PKR):
- 100-page: PKR 220 retail / PKR 175 bulk (20+) / PKR 145 large bulk (100+)
- 200-page: PKR 380 retail / PKR 310 bulk (20+) / PKR 260 large bulk (100+)
- 400-page: PKR 650 retail / PKR 530 bulk (20+) / PKR 440 large bulk (100+)

Minimum order: 5 pieces. School, office, and account registers. Used by government offices and educational institutions. Custom printing for Allama Iqbal University and similar clients.

title: Custom Printing Services — Overview & Pricing
content:
Arco Papers Custom Printing Services. Available on envelopes, letter pads, file covers, notebooks, and registers.

Capabilities:
- 1–4 colour offset printing
- Digital printing for short runs (50–200 units)
- Logo, address, QR code, or full-colour design
- Spot UV and lamination for covers (extra charge)

Setup / plate fee: PKR 2,500–5,000 (one-time, per colour, per design)
Print surcharge per unit: PKR 3–15 depending on size, colours, and quantity

Turnaround: 3–5 working days for digital; 7–10 working days for offset print runs. Free artwork review. Send design files in PDF, AI, or high-res PNG. Contact Arco Papers sales team for a custom quote.

title: Arco Papers — Company Profile & Ordering Information
content:
Arco Papers is a family-owned paper product manufacturer and supplier based in Islamabad, Pakistan, serving customers across Islamabad, Rawalpindi, and Lahore since 2005.

Product range: Envelopes (C4, C5, DL, A4, courier, window), copier paper (A4/A3, 70gsm/80gsm), stationery (letter pads, spiral notebooks, registers), and files/folders (flat files, box files/lever arch).

Key clients: Islamabad Diagnostic Center (IDC), Allama Iqbal Open University (AIOU), government departments, NGOs, corporate offices. Experience with army tenders, US-AID procurement, and public procurement (PPRA).

Ordering: B2B bank transfer accepted. Delivery available Pakistan-wide for bulk orders (10+ reams / 500+ envelopes). For quotes, contact the sales team or use the Arco Papers online platform.

Custom services: Logo printing on envelopes, pads, folders, and notebooks. Government and NGO tender fulfilment. Large-volume orders welcome.
